Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. Tentative adopted.PLAINTIFF TEMPEST RECOVERY SERVICES,INC. AS SERVICING AGENT Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions is not opposed and it is granted, including money sanctions in the sum of $350 to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Responses are due within 15 calendar days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Curtis Karnow. Not Reported.
